name_en: Ministry of Science, Research and Technology
description: Iran's Ministry of Science, Research and Technology oversees non-medical higher education, research policy, and technology development. It supervises public universities and regulates academic appointments. Under [Mohammad Mehdi Zahedi](/people/mohammad-mehdi-zahedi) (2005–2009), the ministry purged reformist professors and expelled politically active students. Under Minister [Kamran Daneshjoo](/people/kamran-daneshjoo) (2009–2013), the ministry implemented controversial policies including preferential university admissions for [Basij](/orgs/basij) members and purges of reformist faculty.
editorial_notes: Medical universities fall under Ministry of Health, not this ministry.
